subcodes.first_line: This is the remembrance of God unto one of His handmaidens, that He may establish her firmly in His Cause and turn her wholly unto God, the All-Encompassing, the Mighty, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله امه من امائه لیستقیمها علی الامر و یقلبها بکلها الی الله المهیمن العزیز القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
